title: Statements, Conversion & Output
source_outline: Statements: assignment vs expression statements; chained assignment (a = b = 5); tuple unpacking (x, y = 1, 2)
Type conversion: int(), float(), str(), bool(); rounding and truncation behaviour
String basics: single vs double quotes; concatenation; indexing (intro)
Formatted output with f-strings: embedding expressions; format specifiers (:.2f, :d, :>10, :^15)
Type hints (introduction): annotating function parameters and return types
match-case (introduction): structural pattern matching over simple shapes
Comments and readability: line comments; PEP 8 style (introduction)

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
